decision_commentary: Completeness 5: phases array contains all 6 SOW scope_phases with start/end dates, deliverables, and milestone labels. milestone_dates maps all 5 payment milestones (M1–M5) to target dates. dependencies graph complete (each phase → predecessor). Accuracy 5: timeline realistic for commercial_health_center — total duration from start (2026-03-24) to final milestone (2027-06-05) is approximately 62 weeks / 14.5 months. Phase durations match SOW: Ph1=6wks, Ph2=12wks, Ph3=8wks, Ph4=8wks, Ph5=5wks, Ph6=23wks (SOW specifies 20 weeks minimum; 23 is realistic for COFEPRIS). All dates in ISO-8601 format. No dependency inversions. Rubric benchmark for health center: 18–26 months total design+permitting — this schedule covers design+permitting at ~15 months; within range for architecture phases only (excluding construction). Clarity 5: each phase has named milestone, start/end dates, and deliverables. Critical path visible through milestone_dates. note documents COFEPRIS as most variable element. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: schedule produced after activation conditions (implied — same session as contract signing M1). No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia gate for project-schedule. Pablo fires after Vera activation confirmation.
